theme_notes: Today's touchstones: US-Iran war enters a fourth consecutive night of strikes with a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz pushing Brent crude to $85; Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei died and was buried; Spain blanked France 2-0 in the World Cup semifinal setting up a Spain vs. Argentina final; a T-Rex fossil sold at auction for a record $50.1M.
settled: Even the Strait of Hormuz is calmer than your balance. For now.
Spain and Argentina in the final. You two in a zero balance. Both deserve a trophy.
The T-Rex sold for $50M. You're $50M ahead of that guy. Congrats.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup final beer. You're still losing the bigger game.
France lost 2-0 to Spain last night. You're trending the same direction.
Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz. You control none of your finances.
England lost to Argentina. France lost to Spain. You owe. Pattern here.
Oil's at $85 a barrel. You're worth less than a barrel of oil. Reflect.
Enough for a news alert subscription. You'd know about Iran before paying this.
Khamenei died. Your excuses should follow.
Spain blanked France 2-0. You can't manage a single payment.
That's a post-blockade grocery run. Pay before the price doubles.
The US hit Iran for the fourth straight night. Your partner hit their limit.
Half a barrel of war-premium crude. All of the shame.
Senate blocked a trillion-dollar Pentagon budget. You're blocking far less. Worse look.
The T-Rex went for $50M. You're still the bigger fossil in this relationship.
The US launched a naval blockade. Your partner launched an invoice. Guess which stings.
Iran controls Hormuz. That's a geopolitical crisis. This is also a crisis.
The Pentagon is at war with Iran. Somehow you're the more disruptive force here.
Bigger than a T-Rex skull. More embarrassing. Way less prehistoric.
Brent crude hit $85 on Hormuz fears. Your partner's patience hit zero first.
theyOwe: They owe you less than England owes themselves a credible World Cup performance.
A rounding error in global oil markets. Still collect.
Smaller than a candle for Khamenei's vigil. Light one anyway.
France got blanked 2-0. Your odds of collecting are looking better.
That's a tank of gas at post-blockade prices. Make them fill it.
Enough for a World Cup final nosebleed ticket. You earned it. They owe it.
Argentina beat England last night. You're beating your partner in moral debt.
Real money in a real war economy. They owe it. Collect accordingly.
The ceasefire broke down at $85 oil. Your patience is next.
Iran sank two tankers in Hormuz. They sank your budget. File the claim.
That's the Pentagon contractor per-diem. You're being paid less than a contractor.
Spain vs Argentina in the final. You vs this debt in the final round.
The T-Rex went for $50M at auction. Your patience went for free. Bad deal.
More than the Hormuz oil premium. They owe you geopolitically at this point.
ICE halted traffic stops after two people died. You should halt being lenient.
The US blockaded Iranian ports. Consider your options similarly.
It costs less to reroute a supertanker around Hormuz. They owe you a detour.
A T-Rex doesn't negotiate. Neither should you.
